projectDescription: A full-stack educational platform monorepo built with Express, PostgreSQL, and React, featuring an API server, generated client libraries, and interactive learning experiences like the Pi Day explorer.
keyFeatures: pnpm monorepo with TypeScript project references for efficient builds
Express 5 API server with Zod-validated request/response handling
PostgreSQL database integration via Drizzle ORM
OpenAPI 3.1 spec driving Orval code generation for React Query hooks and Zod schemas
Interactive Pi Day educational web app with visualizations, games, and a chatbot
Reusable component mockup sandbox for rapid UI development
publicApiSurface: GET /api/healthz — Health check endpoint returning server status
useHealthCheck() — React Query hook for the health check endpoint
healthCheck() — raw fetch function for the health check endpoint
db — Drizzle ORM instance with PostgreSQL connection
pool — pg.Pool instance for direct database access
